judge_thought:
Explanation: 
The question asks for the only tournament with a British runner-up. Looking at the runners-up in each tournament:
- Tournament 1 (Philip Morris K.K. Championship): Toshimitsu Izawa (Japan)
- Tournament 2 (Sun Chlorella Classic): Daisuke Maruyama, Taichi Teshima (Japan, Japan)
- Tournament 3 (Tsuruya Open): Keiichiro Fukabori (Japan), Scott Laycock (Britain), Tatsuya Mitsuhashi (Japan), Taichi Teshima (Japan), Shinichi Yokota (Japan)
- Tournaments 4–13: Only Japanese or Korean runners-up are listed.

Among these, only in the Tsuruya Open (2004) is there a British runner-up, Scott Laycock. Hence, the Prediction Answer "Tsuruya Open" is correct.
